title: MMOG's cheat menu
description: A very awesome cheat menu that DOES NOT WORK ON SERVERS!!
body:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mmogs-cheat-menu
This mod is on curseforge too! This is for only 1.20.1 and does not work in public servers. It is client sided but I put in safeguards so that you cant cheat in servers without the mod installed. You can still join servers with it on but it doesn't work. 

This mod has several features and hacks such as:

Gamemode swapper in no cheat worlds
Dimension swapper without portals
Turn invincible
Turn invisible
No hunger
Spawn 500 tnt
Clear inventory with no cheats
Super speed
And many more!
